name: python3-slowapi
title: python3-slowapi
summary: rate limiting library for Starlette and FastAPI
description:
rate limiting library for Starlette and FastAPI
Slowapi is inspired by the Flask-Limiter library, it allows
controlling request rates on API endpoints to prevent abuse,
ensure fair usage, and help maintain system stability.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-slowapi because rate limiting library for Starlette and FastAPI.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-slowapi as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-slowapi with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-slowapi --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
